title: Celeritas Shooting Club
description: Professional indoor shooting range in Budapest offering guided shooting experiences with various firearms under the supervision of certified instructors.

title: Retek Bisztró
description: A beloved neighbourhood bistro known for seasonal Hungarian cuisine and a welcoming atmosphere.

title: Budapest Pub Crawl
description: Explore Budapest's famous ruin bars and nightlife scene on a guided pub crawl through the city's best spots.

title: Széchenyi Thermal Bath
description: Iconic thermal bath complex with large outdoor pools and grand architecture in City Park (Városliget).

title: New York Café
description: Famous historic café with lavish interiors—great for coffee, desserts, and a classic Budapest atmosphere.

title: Szimpla Kert
description: Budapest's best-known ruin bar—quirky décor, multiple rooms, lively nights (and often a Sunday market).

title: Hungarian Parliament
description: The iconic Neo-Gothic Parliament building on the banks of the Danube is one of Europe's oldest legislative buildings and Budapest's most photographed landmark. Guided tours available inside.

title: Fisherman's Bastion
description: A fairytale-like terrace on Buda Castle Hill offering one of the most stunning panoramic views of the Danube and Pest. Named after the fishermen who defended this stretch of the city wall.

title: Heroes' Square
description: One of Budapest's most iconic landmarks featuring the Millennium Monument with statues of the seven chieftains of the Magyars and other important national leaders.
